name: SCC_V2G_EVCC_PreCharge_TimeoutInd
title: SCC_V2G_EVCC_PreCharge_TimeoutInd
description: The callback is called as soon as an V2G_EVCC_PreCharge_Timeout occurs.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of the SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
